result.markdown:
--- title: "第12课-R假设检验方法" --- # **假设检验的概念**{data-transition="fade-in slide-out" data-background-video="https://assets.mixkit.co/videos/preview/mixkit-3d-animation-of-a-hallway-in-an-alien-ship-14131-large.mp4" data-transition-speed="fast"} **科幻故事：**在人类的持续探索之下，终于在KIC8462852恒星处发现外太空文明，外星人也捕捉到人类探测器的信号和地球的坐标，2252年外星人回访地球，由于其携带大量共生生物，致使地球人发生大面积感染，且致死率极高。别无选择，人类迅速打造了一艘”诺亚方舟“，准备移居其他星球，以躲避这次灾难。方舟将尽可能多地携带健康人，以提高人类基因遗传成功的概率。就在方舟启程之刻，突然有3名无法辨别来源的同类人（或外星人）敲打舱门，要求一起逃离地球，问题：请你判断来的人是地球人还是外星人？ ## **补充信息**{data-transition="fade-in slide-out"} 地球人的身高$h_e \sim N(\mu_e,\sigma_e)$平均身高$\mu_e=1.70 m,\sigma_e= 0.1 m$;外星人的信息掌握甚少。已知方舟外的3个智慧生物的平均身高$\bar{h}=1.85 m$。请依据以上信息回答问题（做出结论）。像这样根据部分样本的信息（$\bar{h}$）来推断样本属于哪一个总体的问题，属于假设检验(Hypothesis Testing)。 - (1)提出原假设$H_0$和备择假设$H_A$ 本例中，$H_0$ 来者是地球人；$H_A$ 来者是外星人 - (2)原假设正确的情况下，计算样本统计量 本例中，$H_0$ 来者是地球人（假设是正确的），按照这个假设 可以进一步获取地球人$h$的分布信息 ## **身高分布**{data-transition="fade-in slide-out"} ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture12_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-1-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## **门外三个人的“位置”**{data-transition="fade-in slide-out"} ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture12_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## **(3)做出统计推断**{data-transition="fade-in slide-out"} 计算蓝色区域的概率，以表征门外人平均身高$\bar{h} \ge 1.85$的概率（包括更极端的情况） ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pnorm(1.85,1.7,0.1/sqrt(3))#黄色区域面积 ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] 0.9953126 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} 1-pnorm(1.85,1.7,0.1/sqrt(3))#蓝色区域面积 ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] 0.004687384 ``` ::: ::: 结论：门外不可能是地球人 # **认识鸢尾花数据集**{data-transition="fade-in slide-out" data-background="white" data-background-image="H:/上课材料/生命科学竞赛-数据处理与分析/fig/iris.background.jpg" } ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: # **常见的单变量统计方法** {data-transition="concave"} ![示例图片](H:/上课材料/生命科学竞赛-数据处理与分析/fig/statistics.1y.png){width=100%} ## **常见统计方法的假设** {data-transition="zoom" data-transition-speed="fast"} [请查看此视频的前1分钟](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1uP4y1M7WC?spm_id_from=333.337.search-card.all.click) ## **T检验**{data-transition="zoom" data-background="white"}
请检验花萼长和花瓣长之间是否有显著性差异？ ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} t.test(iris$Sepal.Length,iris$Petal.Length) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Welch Two Sample t-test data: iris$Sepal.Length and iris$Petal.Length t = 13.098, df = 211.54, p-value < 2.2e-16 alternative hypothesis: true difference in means is not equal to 0 95 percent confidence interval: 1.771500 2.399166 sample estimates: mean of x mean of y 5.843333 3.758000 ``` ::: :::
## **方差分析(ANOVA-one way)** {data-background="white" data-transition="zoom"} 请比较不同品种花萼长(或花瓣长)之间是否有显著性差异？ ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} aov.fit <- aov(Sepal.Length~Species,data = iris) summary(aov.fit) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F) Species 2 63.21 31.606 119.3 <2e-16 *** Residuals 147 38.96 0.265 --- Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1 ``` ::: ::: ## **多重比较(posthoc)**{data-background-transition="slide" data-background="white"} 哪些花种之间有显著性差异？ 

  

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(agricolae)
lsd <- LSD.test(aov.fit,"Species")
lsd$groups
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
           Sepal.Length groups
virginica         6.588      a
versicolor        5.936      b
setosa            5.006      c
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
tuckey <- HSD.test(aov.fit,"Species")
tuckey$groups
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
           Sepal.Length groups
virginica         6.588      a
versicolor        5.936      b
setosa            5.006      c
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
lsd.01 <- LSD.test(aov.fit,"Species",alpha = 0.01)
lsd.01$groups
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
           Sepal.Length groups
virginica         6.588      a
versicolor        5.936      b
setosa            5.006      c
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
tuckey.01 <- HSD.test(aov.fit,"Species",alpha = 0.01)
tuckey.01$groups
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
           Sepal.Length groups
virginica         6.588      a
versicolor        5.936      b
setosa            5.006      c
```


:::
:::
## **我们错过了什么？**{data-background-transition="fade" data-transition-speed="fast" style="color:black;"} [请继续观看完视频](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1uP4y1M7WC?spm_id_from=333.337.search-card.all.click) # **线性回归-review again**{data-background-transition="zoom" data-transition-speed="fast" style="color:black;"} 

  

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
lm.fit <- lm(Sepal.Length~Sepal.Width,data=iris)
lm.fit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

Call:
lm(formula = Sepal.Length ~ Sepal.Width, data = iris)

Coefficients:
(Intercept)  Sepal.Width  
     6.5262      -0.2234  
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
plot(lm.fit)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](lecture12_files/figure-html/ex5-1.png){width=672}
:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](lecture12_files/figure-html/ex5-2.png){width=672}
:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](lecture12_files/figure-html/ex5-3.png){width=672}
:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](lecture12_files/figure-html/ex5-4.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
x.matrix <- matrix(
  c(rep(1,length(iris$Sepal.Width)),iris$Sepal.Width),length(iris$Sepal.Width),2)
qr.x <- qr(x.matrix)
qq <- qr.Q(qr.x)
rr <- qr.R(qr.x)
t(qq)%*%(qq)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
              [,1]          [,2]
[1,]  1.000000e+00 -2.114194e-17
[2,] -2.114194e-17  1.000000e+00
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
qr.coef(qr.x,iris$Sepal.Length)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1]  6.5262226 -0.2233611
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
1+.Machine$double.eps>1
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] TRUE
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
system.time({x.matrix <- matrix(
  c(rep(1,length(iris$Sepal.Width)),iris$Sepal.Width),length(iris$Sepal.Width),2)
qr.x <- qr(x.matrix)
qr.coef(qr.x,iris$Sepal.Length)
})
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
   user  system elapsed 
      0       0       0 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
system.time({lm.fit <- lm(Sepal.Length~Sepal.Width,data=iris)
lm.fit
})
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
   user  system elapsed 
      0       0       0 
```


:::
:::
